question: What text appears below the circular logo at the start of the video? A. played by B. Oliver Brandl C. ollihess D. www.ollhess.de
How many large gongs are visible in the room during the performance?
What color is the long-sleeved shirt worn by the musician playing the handpan? A. Black B. White C. Blue D. Bronze
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Two men sit cross-legged on a beige rug placed over dark wooden floorboards. The musician on the left wears a white long-sleeved shirt and taps a bronze handpan positioned in front of him. The musician on the right wears a black t-shirt and strikes a large gong mounted on an orange stand with two mallets. Three other gongs stand in the background, and a second handpan rests unused on the rug.

Describe the sequence of visual scenes shown from the start of the video until the musicians begin playing.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a circular yellow and brown logo appears centered on screen; at 2s, abstract particles form a cloud shape above a dark band; at 4s, a textured off-white surface fills the frame; at 6s, two men appear sitting on a rug playing a handpan and striking a gong.
